title: Game Of Darts Overview
seoTitle: Game Of Darts Overview | BarkinMad Studios
description: Discover Game Of Darts, the feature-rich darts scoring app for iPhone and iPad with multiple game modes, player statistics, Game Center support, DartBot, and premium features.
summary: Everything you need to score matches, track your progress, challenge DartBot, and improve your darts game in one app.

images.alt: Game Of Darts main setup screen
images.caption: Create players, choose a game mode, and start playing.
Personalise the app to suit the way you play.

sections.heading: What Is Game Of Darts?
paragraphs: Game Of Darts is a feature-rich darts scoring app from [BarkinMad Studios](/about), designed for casual games, league nights, practice sessions, and competitive matches on iPhone and iPad.

Whether you're playing X01, Cricket, Snooker Darts, Bob's 27, or one of the many other supported game modes, the app makes it easy to keep score, track your progress, unlock achievements, compete on Game Center, and continue improving your game.

sections.heading: Everything You Need in One Place
paragraphs: This guide brings together everything you need to get the most from Game Of Darts. Learn the controls, explore every game mode, discover match types, challenge DartBot, review your statistics, customise the app, and compete on the leaderboards.
Whether you're playing your very first match or looking to improve your averages, these guides will help you make the most of every feature.

featureShowcases.heading: Start Playing in Minutes
featureShowcases.summary: Create your players, choose a game mode, and start your first match in just a few taps.
body: Game Of Darts is designed to get you from launching the app to throwing your first dart as quickly as possible.
Whether you're playing a quick practice game, a league match, or a casual session with friends, setting up a new game is fast and straightforward.
bullets: Quick setup for iPhone and iPad.
Supports casual, practice, and competitive matches.
Guides you from player creation through to match results.

image.alt: Game Of Darts main setup screen for quick match
image.caption: Everything starts from the main match setup screen.

featureShowcases.heading: Improve Every Time You Play
featureShowcases.summary: Track your progress, compare your results, and keep improving after every match.
body: Game Of Darts is more than a score tracker. Review your statistics, compare leaderboard positions, unlock achievements, and challenge yourself against DartBot as your skills improve.
Every match helps build a clearer picture of your performance, making it easier to identify strengths and areas to work on.
bullets: Unlock achievements and improve with DartBot.

image.caption: Track your progress long after the final dart.
